metadata.description: Colophon — living, in-repo design systems for GitHub Copilot.

plugins.name: colophon
plugins.description: Keeps a repo's design system in .agents/design/ as a shared, versioned design source, renders/edits it in a Copilot canvas, and makes Copilot generate UI from its tokens, components, and principles — the source of truth for design, with configurable per-area port targets that say what each surface ships as (React web, native WinUI/XAML, SwiftUI) and which reference/skill ports the design into it.
